name: Propanc Biopharma, Inc.
business: Propanc Biopharma is a biopharmaceutical company developing a novel approach to prevent recurrence and metastasis from solid tumors by using pancreatic proenzymes that target and eradicate cancer stem cells in patients suffering from pancreatic, ovarian and colorectal cancers.

exposures.sentence: We are a biopharmaceutical company developing a novel approach to prevent recurrence and metastasis from solid tumors by using pancreatic proenzymes that target and eradicate cancer stem cells in patients suffering from pancreatic, ovarian and colorectal cancers.

tamClaims.claim: Global metastatic cancer treatment market is projected to reach $111 billion by 2027.
tamClaims.sentence: The global metastatic cancer treatment market is predicted to reach $111 billion by 2027, according to a January 2022 report by Emergen Research.

tamClaims.claim: World market for pancreatic cancer drugs is projected to grow to $6.93 billion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: The world market for pancreatic cancer drugs is projected to grow to $6.93 billion by the year 2030, according to Brainy Insights.

tamClaims.claim: Global market for ovarian cancer drugs expected to reach $13.9 billion by 2029.
tamClaims.sentence: The global market for ovarian cancer drugs expected to reach $13.9 billion by 2029, according to iHealthcareAnalyst.
